title: NATURAL JOIN on virtual table results in "parse error in rank function"
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt0 USING fts5(c0, c1);
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt1 USING fts5(c0);
SELECT * FROM vt1 NATURAL JOIN vt0 WHERE vt0.c1 MATCH 'a';
key_bug_features: NATURAL JOIN on virtual tables with rank function

CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt1 USING fts5(c0);
